title: Stabilize core AccordionComposer and Budget APIs
description: Refactor AccordionComposer and budget.ts to ensure API stability and robustness. Lock down @alpha interfaces and improve input validation.
acceptance_criteria: Promote stable parts of budget.ts and distill from @alpha to stable or define a clear roadmap
Implement custom tokenizer support in estimateTokens via AccordionConfig
Fix enforceBudget to strictly respect maxTokens even with 'never drop' packets by truncating further if necessary
Add input validation for agent and task in AccordionComposer.compose()

title: Harden framework adapters (AI SDK, LangChain) for production use
description: Improve the robustness of ai-sdk and langchain adapters. Add input validation, handle empty bundles, and improve metadata mapping.
acceptance_criteria: accordionSystemPrompt returns an empty string for empty bundles instead of potentially failing
toDocuments handles missing metadata gracefully and uses totalTokens if available for estimation
Unit tests for both adapters cover edge cases like empty packets and missing fields
All adapter exports are correctly typed and documented in API.md

title: Improve resource management and concurrency safety in AccordionComposer
description: Address potential memory leaks in the static cache and ensure expand() is safe for concurrent calls.
acceptance_criteria: Add a size limit or TTL-based cleanup to the static AccordionComposer.cache to prevent memory leaks
Ensure expand() handles concurrent requests for the same tier/reason without duplicate packets or race conditions
Provide a method to clear the global static cache if needed
Add tests for concurrent expand() calls and cache eviction

title: Prepare context-accordion for 0.1.0 stable/beta release
description: Finalize documentation, ensure CI/CD is green, and perform a final API audit before release.
acceptance_criteria: Complete API.md with full documentation of all public classes and methods
Update README.md with clear integration examples for Harbor
Verify package.json exports and types are correctly mapped for consumer projects
